Game Developer
Sep 3, 2024

Overview:
Play as Luke, a chill university student with a secret advantage. He has done this all before. Through trial and error (and error... and error), he has spent his first year building the perfect base. Now, he's finally ready to move on to Phase Two, pushing each relationship to its full potential. Each relationship a different girl, a different kink, a different fetish.​

Thread Updated: 2026-07-19
Release Date: 2026-07-19
Developer: UnknownWhiteRaven - Patreon
Censored: No
Version: 0.41
OS: Windows, Linux, Mac
Language: English
Genre:
2DCG, AI CG, Animated, Male Protagonist, Ahegao, Bdsm, Big Ass, Big Tits, Creampie, Footjob, Futa/Trans, Handjob , Masturbation, Milf, Oral Sex, Teasing, Titfuck, Vaginal sex, Virgin, Humor, Romance

Installation:
1. Extract and run.

Changelog:
v0.41 Hotfix
  • Fixed the Pocketwatch card bug
v0.40
  • New Amber event
  • New Amber animation
  • Implemented the game loop
  • New UI
  • New UI sounds
v0.36
  • 2 new Raven events
  • 3 Raven animations
  • Some bugfixes
v0.35
  • 2 new Amber events
  • Amber animation
  • New Lily corruption event
  • 3 Lily animations
  • Some bugfixes
v0.34
  • New Lily event
  • 4 Lily animations
  • New Raven event
  • Raven animation
  • Some bugfixes
v0.33
  • Added new Lexi event
  • Added new Luna event (Dom route)
  • Added 3 Lexi animations
  • Added 2 Luna animations
  • Some bugfixes
v0.32
  • Added new event for Lily Corruption
  • Added new event for Morgan
  • Added animation for Lily Corruption
  • Changed UI
  • Removed unrelated and extra tags of the girls
  • You can now see all the events in the choice tree screen.
  • Bugfixes
v0.31
  • Added new event for Lily Vanilla
  • Added new event for Lily Corruption
  • Added new event for Raven
  • Added new event for Amber
  • Added animation for Lily Corruption, Raven
  • Threshold for bartender minigame has been reduced to 400
  • Skip button added to the bartender minigame
  • Bugfixes
v0.3
  • Initial F95 Release

Developer Notes:





































•Thank you for playing the game. If you enjoyed it, please consider supporting its development.

DOWNLOAD
Win/Linux: GOFILE - DATANODES - MEGA - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE
Mac: GOFILE - DATANODES - MEGA - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE

YogSothoth1982 said:

Click to expand...
I mean every girl has their own story so you could just choose not to play amber and luna.
But amber will always be a futa and luna's storyline will always be about bdsm.
Lesbian as in the sense of girl+girl+luke will probably happen in some harems and in morgans storyline. But just girl+girl, I cannot see a way to fathomably sideline luke. We can maybe transform luke into a girl in a certain route.
We are quite new to the dom-sub side of things, but there will most likely be femdom as well. as we are quite new to bdsm we want to ask some questions.
by your notion I am getting that morgan, lexi and raven are not dominant enough to be classified as femdom for you.Is this correct? if so what kind of character would you classify as femdom

Unknown White Raven

Newbie
Game Developer
Sep 3, 2024
99
270
Aug 6, 2025
  • Add bookmark
  • #9
Anon Wake said:
Kinda goated so far
Click to expand...
Thank you, opinion on the general story structure?
We have tried to make the game chill in general and unserious at times. We also put the player in the middle of the story. This will probably turn off people who are looking for serious, dramatic stories. These first events work more like an introduction to the characters more than plots so there will be some plots involving some characters in the future.
Also opinion on animations?
Keep in mind we started learning animations while making the game so there are quality differences between the animations. Those made later are generally better. You can usually tell which was made later by the boob physics.

Like Quote Reply
